pub struct Scanner {
    logger: slog::Logger,
}

impl Scanner {
    pub fn new(logger: slog::Logger) -> Self {
        Self { logger }
    }

    pub fn run(&self, targets: &[String]) -> Vec<ScanResult> {
        let mut results = Vec::new();
        for target in targets {
            slog::info!(self.logger, "scanning"; "target" => target);
            let result = self.scan_target(target);
            slog::info!(self.logger, "scan complete"; "target" => target);
            results.push(result);
        }
        results
    }

    fn scan_target(&self, url: &str) -> ScanResult {
        ScanResult { url: url.to_string(), status: 200 }
    }
}

pub struct ScanResult {
    pub url: String,
    pub status: u16,
}

fn main() {
    let drain = slog::Discard;
    let logger = slog::Logger::root(drain, slog::o!());
    let scanner = Scanner::new(logger);
    let targets = vec!["https://example.com".to_string()];
    let _results = scanner.run(&targets);
}
